race.comment: HOOKED ON WEALTH (17) possesses a powerful turn of foot at his best but often leaves himself with too much to do. The low draw could see him cluttered away again, though if the gaps appear he'll take plenty of stopping. PERSIAN CAVIAR (13) improved nicely second-up at Sandown-Lakeside. She's a lightly raced mare on the rise and looks capable of going on with it. GOLD SPIRIT (2) comes through stronger form and brings ratings that stack up well here. The apprentice will need to produce a smart ride from the draw, but the ability is there. DELIGHTFUL SHECKY (7) is likely to get well back from his gate, though a strong tempo would bring him right into the race late. INVERTATIONAL (15) also possesses a sharp turn of foot when the pace is genuine and shouldn't be dismissed.
